---
title: "Estimating a simple LMTP under a known data-generating process"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Estimating a simple LMTP under a known data-generating process}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  \usepackage[utf8]{inputenc}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.width = 7,
  fig.height = 4.5
)
set.seed(2025)
library(modulatR)
library(TargetedLearning)
```

# Generate the dataset

```{r}
# to determine truth: 
n <- 1e6
W <- rnorm(n)
eL1 <- rnorm(n)
eA1 <- rnorm(n)
eL2 <- rnorm(n)
eA2 <- rnorm(n)
eY  <- rnorm(n)

L1 <- 0.5 * W + eL1
A1 <- 0.6 * W + 0.8 * L1 + eA1
L2 <- 0.4 * W + 0.7 * A1 + 0.6 * L1 + eL2
A2 <- 0.3 * W + 0.5 * L2 + eA2
Y  <- 1 + 0.5 * W + 0.4 * L1 + 0.3 * L2 + 1.2 * A1 + 0.8 * A2 + eY

A1d <- A1 + 1
L2d <- 0.4 * W + 0.7 * A1d + 0.6 * L1 + eL2
A2d <- (0.3 * W + 0.5 * L2d + eA2) + 1
Yd  <- 1 + 0.5 * W + 0.4 * L1 + 0.3 * L2d + 1.2 * A1d + 0.8 * A2d + eY

truth_EY <- mean(Y)
truth_EYd <- mean(Yd)
truth_diff <- mean(Yd - Y)

c(EY = truth_EY, EYd = truth_EYd, diff = truth_diff)

# now for the DGP 
n <- 8000

W <- rnorm(n)
L1 <- 0.5 * W + rnorm(n)
A1 <- 0.6 * W + 0.8 * L1 + rnorm(n)
L2 <- 0.4 * W + 0.7 * A1 + 0.6 * L1 + rnorm(n)
A2 <- 0.3 * W + 0.5 * L2 + rnorm(n)

Y <- 1 + 0.5 * W + 0.4 * L1 + 0.3 * L2 + 1.2 * A1 + 0.8 * A2 + rnorm(n)

df <- data.frame(
  W = W,
  L1 = L1,
  A1 = A1,
  L2 = L2,
  A2 = A2,
  Y = Y
)


# set up the data
ds <- LMTPData$new(
  data = df,
  A_cols = c("A1", "A2"),
  L_cols = list("L1", "L2"),
  W_cols = "W",
  Y_col = "Y"
)

ds

# define the LMTP 
pol <- mtp_additive_shift(delta = 1)
policy_seq <- repeat_policy_over_time(pol, tau = ds$tau())

policy_seq

# also define the identity 
identity_seq <- identity_policy(
  A_type = "continuous",
  tau = ds$tau()
)

identity_seq

# set up nuisance estimation 
nf_shift <- LMTPNuisanceFactory$new(
  learners_g = nadir::lnr_glm_density,
  policy_seq = policy_seq,
  A_type = "continuous",
  g_mode = "density"
)

nf_identity <- LMTPNuisanceFactory$new(
  learners_g = nadir::lnr_glm_density,
  policy_seq = identity_seq,
  A_type = "continuous",
  g_mode = "density"
)

fluct <- LMTPFluctuationSubmodel$new(
  family = stats::gaussian()
)

# perform two TMLE tasks, one for E[Y^d] and one for E[Y]
task_shift <- make_lmtp_tl_task(
  ds = ds,
  policy_seq = policy_seq,
  nuisance_factory = nf_shift,
  fluctuation = fluct,
  learners_Q = nadir::lnr_glm
)

task_identity <- make_lmtp_tl_task(
  ds = ds,
  policy_seq = identity_seq,
  nuisance_factory = nf_identity,
  fluctuation = fluct,
  learners_Q = nadir::lnr_glm
)

fit_shift <- task_shift$run()
fit_identity <- task_identity$run()

print(fit_shift)
print(fit_identity)

# calculate difference and compare to truth 
fit_diff <- lmtp_delta_contrast(
  fit1 = fit_shift,
  fit0 = fit_identity,
  transform = "difference"
)

comparison <- data.frame(
  parameter = c("E[Y]", "E[Y^d]", "E[Y^d] - E[Y]"),
  truth = c(truth_EY, truth_EYd, truth_diff),
  estimate = c(fit_identity$estimate, fit_shift$estimate, fit_diff$estimate),
  se = c(fit_identity$se, fit_shift$se, fit_diff$se)
)

comparison

print(fit_diff)
```
